positive: A stylized minimalist depiction of a wise owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by ethereal swirling forest elements like glowing bioluminescent moss and delicate feather motifs. The composition must feature a strong central silhouette. The style is inspired by Nordic folklore and modern graphic design, using clean vector lines and negative space. Color palette: deep indigo, muted sapphire blue, soft gold, and creamy off-white. The mood is magical and contemplative. Artwork must be highly isolated on a clean background, suitable for direct apparel printing. Perfect contrast, intricate details, highly scalable vector style.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, letter, blur, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, grainy, noisy, ugly, dirty, poorly drawn, cropped
